meaning: adj.车的,用车辆运载的,作为媒介的
examples: Traffic congestion is characterized by slower speeds, longer trip times, and increased vehicular queueing.
The road is closed to vehicular traffic.
Statistics vary but reports of non-vehicular injuries related to texting are on the rise worldwide.
Dark of the Moon features two core gameplay systems: vehicular combat and third-person, Gears of War-style shooting.
